name: Voice Preservation And Editing Suite
description: Propose a benchmark concept for voice preservation and editing suite.
related_rules: Editing passes may not reduce entropy and idiosyncrasy below the configured preservation floor.
Style-preservation edits must restore voice markers when cleanup operations over-normalize prose.
Voice preservation and style drift metrics MUST be applied before and after any automated editing or post-processing step.
related_validators: After each edit pass, compare entropy and idiosyncrasy against the pre-edit reference and restore voice markers when needed.
For editing pipelines, measure voice preservation and semantic fidelity before enabling new editors in production.
Run edit passes that normalize voice and verify post-edit entropy/idiosyncrasy preservation checks catch degradation.
Style averaging during editing that erodes voice.
related_failure_modes: Editing pipelines slowly erode voice through cumulative small changes that evade single-step checks.
Style drift detector flags intentional stylistic shifts (e.g., POV changes) as regressions.
